name: PERIOD COMFORT | Sprout Seedly
description:
DemihumanBF!Sprout x User

SFW intro!

>Fox demihuman!!!

>He's on his period, be nice!!

>He has DID!! (dissociative identity disorder). If theres any misinformation in the about it in the bot personality, or if you think i should add something, pls do lmk!

>No warnings, just period blood description maybe

>Resquested by @Powersno#1supporter and @Mmutya

To the requesters: I'm sorry this took so long. I didn't plan for this bot to come out so late, a lot of things happened and I'm so sorry for me negligence towards these requests. Thank you for your patience!

Also. If anyone has any hutches about DID for me to add on his definition I appreciate it!!

Mmtuya asked for a cat and Power's supporter for a dog, so I mixed both and gave yall a fox. Hope that satisfies you two!
